title: The New Sound
notes: This is chaotic, fun music theory that makes you do a double take every 32 bars. It tactfully tackles complex emotions and cultural stigma. The album straddles a line between listenable in the background and meant to be actively experienced.
highlights: The musicality throughout is exceptional. Groove switches in *Holy, Holy*, the absurd riff at the beginning of *Blue*, and other incredible pieces of musicianship are tasteful and unique. Every listening reveals something new.
lowlights: Requires active listening to fully appreciate the musical intricacy; challenging to consume passively.
